creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 197864
Absolute FreeBSD, 3rd Edition Screenshot

This issue is an example used in mwl's Absolute FreeBSD, 3rd Edition (See attachment)

Further, sys/conf/files.amd64 indicates that vga and vesa use syscons/sc:

dev/syscons/scvesactl.c optional sc vga vesa

This is a broader issue of kernel or option dependency tracking and/or documentation.
